author: tEc5
content: Result: Committed 588ca1a. Env-var unification complete: SOCKET_ROOT_ENV/DEFAULT_SOCKET_ROOT exported from crossbridge-protocol; supervisor (resolve_register_socket) and server (resolve_runtime_root) both honor CROSSBRIDGE_SOCKET_ROOT with precedence flag > env > default; client re-exports the protocol constants. New crossbridge-e2e crate added to workspace with submit_then_answer_round_trip in tests/round_trip.rs and ShortTempDir/ChildGuard/RepoFixture helpers in tests/common/mod.rs. cargo test --workspace: 91 pass / 0 fail / 1 ignored. cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings clean. cargo fmt --check clean. Caveat: test is #[ignore]'d pending #18 (pre-existing client xb-ref labeling bug surfaced by the test); per kickoff constraint, not fixed in-band.
